rationale: This is a Gardenscapes-style live-action/3D-render fail skit with no connection to a connect-the-dots line-drawing puzzle — the cat-on-keyboard gag doesn't set up any color-matching or move-limited goal payoff, so the hook-to-gameplay handoff would feel deceptive and tank IPM quality. Palette (greens/navy/orange) and character-driven slapstick also clash with the game's clean, character-free, calm/satisfying UI mood. Only marginal audience overlap via broad casual female-skewing viewers; recommend skipping unless reworked into a "satisfying clear" fail-then-win format using the actual ball-connect board.
